claim_boundary: Measures binary-prefilter recall parity against a synthetic clustered fixture inside the unit test suite. NOT a generalization claim about real granite-embedded corpora; D2 (self-seed fixture cannot back external-advantage claims) is honored. Real-granite re-measurement is a separate gate before flipping HARNESS_MEM_BINARY_PREFILTER=1 in production.
source_describe: Recall parity: binary prefilter ON vs OFF (real sqlite-vec parity)

pool_lt_N_stress.test_name: pool<N stress: BM25-unique hit surfaces through union even when binary prefilter ON
pool_lt_N_stress.verdict: PASS — BM25/RRF union path surfaces lexical-unique target even when its vector would not be in the Hamming-top-bitK dense candidate set. Confirms binary prefilter restricts only the float-dense leg and does not clip lexical/graph union candidates.

production_on_prerequisites: Real-granite-embedded corpus parity re-measurement (binary ON vs OFF recall delta)
pool<N parity stress test GREEN in CI (this commit)
